levels.en:
Passive. Necrodrakon absorbs the HP enemies lose in battle. Whenever an enemy suffers HP loss, [[10%]] of that lost amount is converted into healing for Necrodrakon. Every time the same enemy's total HP loss exceeds [[20%]] of their max HP, their healing received is reduced by [[10%]]. This can trigger up to [[3]] times per enemy. Once the trigger limit is reached, Necrodrakon inflicts Abyssal Sacrifice on that enemy, further reducing their healing received by [[20%]].
Active. Necrodrakon deals [[100%]]<ATK> base damage 3 times to all enemies, plus extra damage equal to [[4%]] of each target's lost HP. This extra damage cannot exceed [[100%]]<ATK>. Targets affected by Abyssal Sacrifice take true damage instead and are stunned for [[2.5]]s.
levels.zh:
被动地，深渊蚀骨龙汲取战场中敌人损耗的生命力，每当敌人受到生命损耗时，损耗量的[[10%]]会转化为对深渊蚀骨龙的生命回复；每当同一名敌人累计损耗超过其[[20%]]最大生命值时，使这名敌人受到的治疗效果降低[[10%]]，该效果对同一名敌人至多触发[[3]]次，触发次数达到上限时对该敌人施加"深渊献祭"，额外使其受到的治疗效果降低[[20%]]。
主动释放时，对所有敌人造成3次[[100%]]<ATK>基础伤害并附加目标[[4%]]已损耗生命值的伤害，附加伤害至多不超过[[100%]]<ATK>；拥有"深渊献祭"的目标受到的伤害类型会变为真实伤害，且会被眩晕[[2.5]]秒。

levels.en: Increases base damage per hit to [[120%]]<ATK>.
levels.zh: 每次造成的基础伤害提升至[[120%]]<ATK>。

levels.en: Whenever a non-summoned enemy is defeated, Necrodrakon gains bonus max HP and ATK equal to [[10%]] of that enemy's max HP and [[10%]] of their ATK. The total bonus from this effect cannot exceed [[50%]] of Necrodrakon's corresponding initial stats.
levels.zh: 场上每有非召唤物敌人被击败，都会为深渊噬骨龙提供该敌人[[10%]]最大生命值和[[10%]]攻击力的加成，这个效果提供的属性总计不超过自身对应初始属性的[[50%]]。

levels.en: Necrodrakon unleashes powerful dragon's breath at the area with the most enemies, dealing [[130%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies in a 1-tile radius and creating an abyss mire that persists for [[5]]s. Enemies within the mire lose [[20]] Haste and [[50%]] movement speed, and take [[30%]]<ATK> damage every [[0.5]]s.
levels.zh: 在敌方最密集区域喷吐龙焰，对半径1格范围内所有敌人造成[[130%]]<ATK>伤害，并制造一片持续[[5]]秒的深渊泥潭，处于泥潭内的敌人急速降低[[20]]点，移动速度降低[[50%]]，并且每[[0.5]]秒受到[[30%]]<ATK>伤害。
喷吐龙焰造成的伤害提升至[[140%]]<ATK>。
喷吐龙焰造成的伤害提升至[[150%]]<ATK>。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[8%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[8%]], and ATK by [[4%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[8%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[8%]]，攻击力提升[[4%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[16%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[16%]], and ATK by [[8%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[16%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[16%]]，攻击力提升[[8%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[24%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[24%]], and ATK by [[12%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[24%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[24%]]，攻击力提升[[12%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[32%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[32%]], and ATK by [[16%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[32%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[32%]]，攻击力提升[[16%]]。

levels.en:
Necrodrakon applies [[Spirit Mark]] to an allied hero in front, granting them Netherdeep.
Netherdeep: The [[spirit-marked hero]] increases their Execution by [[10]] and Penetration by [[10]].
When the [[spirit-marked hero]] deals damage to enemies affected by Abyssal Sacrifice, they deal extra true damage equal to [[12%]] of the damage dealt.
levels.zh:
使身前1名友方英雄成为[[灵能者]]，获得“冥渊”之灵能：[[灵能者]]的终结提高[[10]]点，穿透提高[[10]]点。
[[灵能者]]对拥有"深渊献祭"的敌人造成伤害时，额外附带造成伤害量[[12%]]的真实伤害。

levels.en: Whenever a non-summoned enemy is defeated, the [[spirit-marked hero]]'s ATK increases by [[5%]]. Total ATK gained from this effect cannot exceed [[25%]] of the [[spirit-marked hero]]'s initial ATK.
levels.zh: 每当非召唤物敌人被击败，使[[灵能者]]的攻击力提高[[5%]]，以此效果提升的攻击力累计提升不超过[[灵能者]]初始攻击力的[[25%]]。

levels.en: Necrodrakon targets the [[2]] [[weakest]] enemies, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage and stunning them for [[1]]s. If a target has a shield, they also lose [[200%]]<ATK> shield value.
levels.zh: 以[[最虚弱的]]的[[2]]名敌人为目标，对目标造成[[200%]]<ATK>伤害并使其眩晕[[1]]秒；若目标拥有护盾，则额外使其失去[[200%]]<ATK>的护盾量。

levels.en: Increases the damage dealt to the target to [[250%]]<ATK>.
levels.zh: 对目标造成的伤害提升至[[250%]]<ATK>。
